title: CodeBlockScene
description: Syntax-highlighted code with animated reveal, line highlighting, and focus mode. Powered by remotion-bits CodeBlock.

code.description: Source code to display. Multi-line strings with \n line breaks.

theme.description: Color theme for the code block.

revealType.description: How the code appears. lineByLine: lines reveal sequentially. typing: typewriter effect. highlight: all visible, lines highlight in sequence. fade: simple fade in.

highlightLines.description: Line numbers to highlight (1-indexed). Highlighted lines get a subtle background color.

focusLines.description: Line numbers to focus on (1-indexed). Non-focused lines are dimmed and blurred.

fontSize.description: Font size in pixels. Auto-calculated if omitted.

title.description: Optional title displayed above the code block.

hold.description: How long to hold before exit (seconds)

examples.title: Recursive Fibonacci

examples.code:
git add .
git commit -m "initial commit"
git push origin main

useCase: Teaching programming concepts, showing code examples, demonstrating CLI commands, explaining algorithms step-by-step with line highlighting.
